---
title: "Grace Latham"
---

## Grace Latham

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1887-93)

### Biography

The Grace Latham who was  too busy to be a Gosling in 1869 is probably the same Grace Latham mentioned in a letter from Margaret Roberts to Bullock in which she is described as her cousin who ‘writes well & to the point’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
